acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md has a 0.7.0 section dated 2026-07-12 summarizing the #13 deterministic failure-fingerprint and cross-attempt progress feature.
dist/rigor.cjs remains byte-identical to a fresh build (no bundle change).
rigor release-check --version 0.7.0 passes, and npm run test:all, npm run bench, and claude plugin validate . --strict pass.
constraints: Version bump and changelog only; no source, schema, test, or bundle behavior changes.
Do not modify dist/rigor.cjs, .rigor/policy.json, .rigor/rigor-ci.cjs, or any protected path.
Release must reach main only through a protected pull request with required checks green; never direct-push a release commit.
